task_yaml.task:
I'm cataloguing a band's studio albums and I want canonical data from
MusicBrainz via its API instead of copying from the website.

Here's the band's MusicBrainz page:

    https://musicbrainz.org/artist/5b11f4ce-a62d-471e-81fc-a69a8278c7da

MusicBrainz has a web service (the "ws/2" API). Please use it (not by
scraping the musicbrainz.org HTML) to pull this artist's **album** release
groups, and give me:

- the artist's name (confirm it from the API),
- the three earliest studio albums by first-release date (title + year),
- the total number of album-type release groups the API reports for this
  artist.

Note: MusicBrainz asks clients to send a meaningful User-Agent identifying
the app and a contact, and to respect its rate limit (about one request per
second).

Save the result to `/tmp_workspace/results/musicbrainz_albums.json`, and save
the exact request URL(s) you called plus their raw JSON response(s) to
`/tmp_workspace/results/musicbrainz_evidence/`.
